D_A.name: D_A
D_A.meaning: Gas-phase diffusion coefficient of molecules A
D_A.notes: Written as DA in the nomenclature

D_K.name: D_K
D_K.notes: definition not found; Knudsen diffusion coefficient appears as DKn in the text

D_s.name: D_s
D_s.notes: Written as Ds in the nomenclature

D_{\\mathrm{app},x}.name: D_{\mathrm{app},x}
D_{\\mathrm{app},x}.notes: definition not found; an apparent longitudinal diffusion coefficient is denoted by D in Eq. (19), but not specifically as D_{app,x}

D_{\\text{eff}}.name: D_{\text{eff}}
D_{\\text{eff}}.notes: Written as Deff in the nomenclature and Eq. (6)

D_{eff}.name: D_{eff}
D_{eff}.notes: Same as Deff in the nomenclature and Eq. (6)

H_2.name: H_2
H_2.notes: definition not found; H2O is mentioned in the abstract header text but not defined as a variable

K_A.name: K_A
K_A.notes: definition not found; only K is defined as adsorption equilibrium constant

M_A.name: M_A
M_A.notes: Written as MA in the nomenclature

M_B.name: M_B
M_B.notes: definition not found in the nomenclature; MB appears in Eq. (1) as molar mass of species B but is not listed separately

M_f.name: M_f
M_f.notes: definition not found; the film molar mass is denoted by M in Eq. (9)

P_d.name: P_d
P_d.notes: Written as Pd in the nomenclature

R.name: R
R.notes: Defined also as R = k_B N0

\\dot{n}_A.name: \dot{n}_A
\\dot{n}_A.notes: definition not found; molar flow is denoted by F, not by \dot{n}_A

a.name: a
a.notes: Listed as 'a Aspect ratio' in the nomenclature

cm^2.name: cm^2
cm^2.notes: Not a variable; appears only as a unit (e.g., 1 cm^2/s)

d.name: d
d.notes: definition not found; molecular diameters are written as dA and dB

d_A.name: d_A
d_A.notes: Written as dA in the nomenclature

d_B.name: d_B
d_B.notes: Written as dB; appears in text and Eq. (1) but not as a separate line in the nomenclature list

g.name: g
g.notes: Appears as 'g Net adsorption rate (m^-2 s^-1)' in nomenclature; also reused later as gas viscosity symbol in the typeset list but context distinguishes them

h_{\\text{eq}}.name: h_{\text{eq}}
h_{\\text{eq}}.meaning: Equilibrium surface coverage in the Langmuir model
h_{\\text{eq}}.notes: Written as heq in the nomenclature

m.name: m
m.notes: definition not found; not used as a variable symbol other than as unit (meter, m)

n_A.name: n_A
n_A.notes: Written as nA in the nomenclature

p.name: p
p.notes: definition not found; pressures are written as pA, pB, pA0

p_A.name: p_A
p_A.notes: Written as pA in the nomenclature

p_B.name: p_B
p_B.notes: Written as pB in Eq. (1); mentioned in text but not as a separate line in the nomenclature list

p_{A0}.name: p_{A0}
p_{A0}.meaning: Input partial pressure of reactant A
p_{A0}.notes: Written as pA0 in the nomenclature

s.name: s
s.notes: Written as s (Film thickness (m)) in the nomenclature; note that the same Greek letter sigma is also used later as time constant of adsorption, but the list distinguishes them by context

x.name: x
x.meaning: Distance from the beginning of the channel

x_p.name: x_p
x_p.notes: Written as xp in the nomenclature and in Fig. 1 caption

x_s.name: x_s
x_s.meaning: Distance where the linear part of the reactant pressure is zero
x_s.notes: Written as xs in the nomenclature; described as 'location where the linear part of the pressure distribution would go to zero'

x_t.name: x_t
x_t.meaning: Length of the linear part of the pressure distribution
x_t.notes: Written as xt in the nomenclature
